summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ticksy attendance tracking app. Backend health check working correctly. Frontend UI renders properly with all required elements and data-testid attributes. Navigation between pages works correctly. Protected routes redirect properly. However, Supabase authentication is failing with 400 errors.

integration_issues.issue: Supabase Auth calls failing with 400 status and 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Ticksy branding and subtitle
Sign Up and Log In buttons visible and clickable
Login page renders with email/password inputs and submit button
Sign Up page renders with email/password inputs and submit button
Navigation between Landing → Login → Sign Up works correctly
Backend health check endpoint returns status healthy
Protected routes redirect to landing when not authenticated
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Form inputs are focusable and buttons are enabled
UI elements render correctly with proper styling
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Supabase authentication integration. The publishable key format appears correct (sb_publishable_...) but auth calls are failing with 400 errors. Verify Supabase project configuration, check if the provided credentials are valid, and ensure proper error handling in auth context.
